subcodes.first_line: How sweet is the mention of God by His creation, and how delightful is the remembrance of the Lord by His servant - the mention of the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چه نیکوست ذکر حق خلق خود را و چه قدر ملیحست ذکر مولی عبد خود را ذکر معشوق
